---
comments: false
---

<div class="bio-shell">

<div class="bio-card-research">

<a class="link-btn" href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=grF2Zc4AAAAJ&hl=en&oi=ao" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <span class="left">
    <i class="bi bi-google"></i>
    <span class="label">Google Scholar</span>
  </span>
</a>

## Publications

1.  **Luna, J**. , Jaynes, J. , Xu, H. , Wong, WK. Orthogonal array composite designs for drug combination experiments with applications for tuberculosis. [Statistics in Medicine](https://onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/10.1002/sim.9423). 2022; 1- 18
<a class="inline-btn" href="/docs/publications/Orthogonal array composite designs for drug combination experiments.pdf" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
  <i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> PDF
</a>

## Software


1. [ggDoE](https://ggdoe.netlify.app/index.html): Create commonly used graphs in Design of Experiments with *ggplot2*
2. [pyLHD](https://pylhd.netlify.app): Latin Hypercube Designs for Python
